summary: First iteration test of Autonomous Routine App (Greek/English, dual-mode). All 8 backend pytest tests passed (100%). All critical frontend flows validated via Playwright mobile viewport (390x844). Backend CRUD (routines/assets/sos/settings), PIN verify, SOS lifecycle work correctly. Frontend: Greek Home with 3 routine cards, EL/EN toggle, routine step flow with Done/SOS/progress dots, 'Μπράβο! Τελείωσες!' completion, Choice Board with 3 calm options leading to 'Ηρέμησες;' + ready button, SOS → /sos screen + backend event creation, /gate PIN 1234 success (9999 shows 'Λάθος κωδικός'), Admin dashboard shows active SOS banner with Resolve ('Λύθηκε'), Settings screen (EL/EN + PIN change), Builder screen (name fields + step list with reorder/edit/delete). MOCKED: SOS notification is stored-only in MongoDB (no real push/SMS/email) as per spec.

issues: Second card title 'Δραστηριότητες στο Σπίτι μετά το σχολείο' breaks awkwardly across lines on 390w (visible hyphenation 'Δραστηριότητε ς'); consider reducing font or allowing more lines to wrap cleanly

action_items: Add testID props to key interactive elements for robust E2E testing: done-button (routine Done), sos-button (routine Βοήθεια), gate-digit-<n> (PIN pad), gate-error, resolve-sos-button, lang-toggle-el/en, settings-save-button, choice-option-<id>, ready-button. Currently tests rely on Greek text labels.
Minor: long text wrapping on the 'Δραστηριότητες στο Σπίτι μετά το σχολείο' card breaks mid-word on narrow screens (see screenshot). Consider adjusting font size or numberOfLines.

Not tested interactively (non-blocking): 3-second long-press on gear icon to open gate (verified direct /gate route works and gate logic is sound), and admin builder add/delete/reorder step mutations (UI elements are visible and rendered).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single file (~380 lines) - acceptable for current scope
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded via projection {'_id': 0} everywhere
Settings uses singleton pattern via id='singleton' - clean
All endpoints under /api prefix, env vars used correctly
Pydantic v1 style .dict() used (OK, works with installed motor/pydantic v2 compat but consider .model_dump() for future-proofing)
seed_data_creation: None - backend auto-seeds 3 default routines on startup. Test data (TEST_ prefix) was created and cleaned up within tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py is reusable. Run: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Frontend selectors currently rely on Greek text labels because testID attributes are missing on many interactive elements. Public URL: https://task-chunker-kids.preview.emergentagent.com. Default PIN: 1234. Admin route: /admin (via /gate). Choice board confirmed at step index 4 of 'Δραστηριότητες' routine (options: Βιβλίο/Μουσική/Ζωγραφική). SOS notification is intentionally MOCKED - only stored in MongoDB, surfaced as admin banner.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. App functions as specified in the PRD.
